lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner used to size the cargo-and-shield trade fit and confirm slot capacities.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Corsair ship page — manufacturer, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Authoritative hull data: optional-internal slot sizes, hardpoint count, base shield/mass and speed used for the cargo and stat figures.

sources.label: Inara — Corsair
sources.what: Ship reference cross-checked for cargo capacity, internals layout, hull price and shipyard availability.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Wiki
sources.what: Corsair role profile, Gutamaya manufacture, and rank-free / medium-pad access notes.

sources.label: YouTube — The Buur Pit
sources.what: Full specifications overview — cargo capacity, internals, speed and pad class drawn on for the hauling assessment.
